Author: Mohit
Message:
feat: TradingView parity — Chart Header, Indicators Modal, Interval Dropdown

- Rewrote ChartTopBar with TradingView-style interval dropdown (Ticks/Seconds/Minutes/Hours/Days groups), favorite interval pills, custom interval modal, compare symbol button
- Built full IndicatorsModal component with sidebar navigation (Personal/Built-in/Community), search, 100+ categorized indicators, add/remove toggle, financial metrics, community scripts

- Replaced inline indicators panel in TradingChart.tsx with full modal dialog
- All dropdowns use CSS hidden/visible pattern for E2E test compatibility
- 4 new E2E tests: interval dropdown, chart style, indicators modal flow, personal sidebar
- All 14 E2E tests passing

feat: TradingView parity — 8 menus, standalone tools, portal popover, no Soon badges

- Rewrote toolRegistry.ts with 8 categories (cursor, lines, fib, patterns, forecasting, brush, text, icon) and ~40+ tool variants, all implemented

Description: Identified a HashiCorp Terraform password field, risking unauthorized infrastructure configuration and security breaches.
Author: Mohit
Message:
feat(chart): TradingView parity Phase 0+1 - OHLC styling, toolbox scroll, icon mappings, E2E tests

Phase 0 - Parity inventory:
- Create docs/TV_PARITY.md with complete feature inventory (44 tools, 20 chart types, 101 indicators)
- Create docs/CHART_VALIDATION_MATRIX.md with validation checklist tables

Phase 1 - UI/UX fixes:
- Restyle OHLC status row with TradingView-like segmented display, tabular-nums, dividers, snap badge
- Refactor toolbox to flex-col with sticky header + scrollable body (data-testid=toolbox-scroll)
- Add 12 missing lucide-react icon imports and mappings for Tier 2 tools
- Preserve chart-ohlc-legend testid with contents wrapper

Phase 2 - E2E coverage:
- Add toolbox scroll test (scroll to bottom group, pick system tool)
- Add OHLC legend structure validation test (O/H/L/C labels, snap badge)
- Add multi-chart layout switch test (2h, 4-pane, back to single)

Description: Identified a HashiCorp Terraform password field, risking unauthorized infrastructure configuration and security breaches.
Author: Mohit
Message:
fix: chart UI polish — clean toolbox header, fix selected badge overlap, proper expand/collapse buttons

- Remove magnet icon + snap mode dropdown from toolbox header (moved snap to toolbar)
- Add selected drawing indicator badge inside toolbox header with pointer-events:none
- Replace +/- text with proper ChevronLeft/Right icons with min 32x32 hit area
- Remove floating 'selected: trend' badge that overlapped toolbar buttons at z-40
- Add data-testid: toolbox-panel, toolbox-collapse, toolbox-expand, selected-tool-indicator
- Fix ToolOptionsPanel left offset to avoid toolbox overlap (245px -> 290px)
- Fix indentation inconsistency on toolbar collapse button
- Update E2E refs: tool-magnet -> toolbar-magnet, tool-minimize -> toolbox-collapse/expand
- Add 3 new E2E tests: badge no-block, expand button hit area, status row structure

Description: Identified a HashiCorp Terraform password field, risking unauthorized infrastructure configuration and security breaches.
Author: Mohit
Message:
Fix drawing visibility tied to Object Tree, restore toolbar, add magnet/layout to toolbar, enhance E2E

- Fix: overlay not repainting after container resize — removed firstBar/lastBar
  dedup from notifyVisibleRangeChange so listeners always fire after chart render
- Fix: added onResize callback to useChart that fires after resizeChartSurface,
  wired to renderOverlay via ref to repaint overlay on every container resize
- Fix: force toolbar uncollapsed on desktop (setToolbarCollapsed(false) in the
  isMobile useEffect desktop branch) — prevents localStorage persistence regression
- Add toolbar-undo, toolbar-redo, toolbar-magnet, toolbar-layout data-testids
- Add Magnet toggle and Layout button to top toolbar (previously only in toolbox)
- Enhance debug hooks: expose getMagnetMode() and pointerToDataPoint() for E2E
- Add E2E tests: toolbar actions visibility, drawing with object tree toggle,
  indicators search and add, all with proper assertions

Description: Identified a HashiCorp Terraform password field, risking unauthorized infrastructure configuration and security breaches.
Author: Mohit
Message:
Fix drawing visibility + anchoring, add Super Charts layout, debug hooks, and E2E coverage

- Fix: call renderOverlay() after startDraft() for all tool kinds (not just finalized), so drawings appear immediately on pointer down
- Fix: subscribe to timeScale visibleTimeRangeChange in overlay, so drawings repaint on scroll/zoom/data updates without drift
- Add subscribeVisibleTimeRangeChange/unsubscribeVisibleTimeRangeChange to @tradereplay/charts ITimeScaleApi with notifyVisibleRangeChange() in render loop
- Add window.__chartDebug hooks (getDrawingsCount, getLastRenderAt, getLastDrawCommitAt, getDrawings) for E2E observability
- Add SuperChart component with layout picker (1x1, 1x2, 2x1, 2+1, 2x2) and per-pane active state
- Add E2E tests: single drawing visibility, debug hook validation, anchoring coordinate stability
